---
title: "Mapping Inequality — HOLC Redlining (Chicago)"
author: "Brock Sauvage"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r load-libraries, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(sf)
library(dplyr)
library(leaflet)
library(spdep)
library(tigris)
library(mapview)
```

```{r load-holc}
holc <- st_read("data/mappinginequality.json", quiet = TRUE) |>
  st_transform(4326)

# Modern Chicago city boundary (limits both the analysis and the map to current bounds,
# since 1930s HOLC areas extend slightly outside today's city limits)
chicago_bounds <- suppressMessages(tigris::places(state = "IL", cb = TRUE)) |>
  filter(NAME == "Chicago") |>
  st_transform(4326)

chicago_holc <- holc |>
  filter(city == "Chicago", state == "IL") |>
  mutate(grade = trimws(grade)) |>                # strip stray whitespace ("A ", "C ")
  filter(grade %in% c("A", "B", "C", "D")) |>     # drop ungraded Commercial/Industrial polygons
  st_make_valid() |>
  st_intersection(chicago_bounds) |>
  filter(st_geometry_type(geometry) %in% c("POLYGON", "MULTIPOLYGON"))

print(paste("HOLC polygons within modern Chicago bounds:", nrow(chicago_holc)))
table(chicago_holc$grade)
```

```{r load-pod-cameras}
pod_cameras <- st_read("data/pod_cameras.geojson", quiet = TRUE) |>
  st_transform(4326)

print(paste("POD cameras:", nrow(pod_cameras)))
```

```{r camera-density-by-grade}
# Counts via point-in-polygon; area in mi² requires a projected CRS
density_by_grade <- chicago_holc |>
  st_make_valid() |>
  mutate(n_cameras = lengths(st_intersects(geometry, pod_cameras))) |>
  st_transform(3435) |>
  mutate(area_mi2 = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) / 2589988.11) |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  group_by(grade, category) |>
  summarise(
    n_polygons    = n(),
    n_cameras     = sum(n_cameras),
    area_mi2      = sum(area_mi2),
    cameras_per_mi2 = n_cameras / area_mi2,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) |>
  mutate(share_pct = n_cameras / sum(n_cameras) * 100) |>
  arrange(grade)

knitr::kable(
  density_by_grade,
  digits    = 2,
  col.names = c("Grade", "Category", "Polygons", "Cameras", "Area (mi²)", "Cameras / mi²", "Share (%)"),
  caption   = "POD camera density by HOLC grade (within modern Chicago bounds)"
)
```

```{r holc-map}
# HOLC canonical colors are already in the `fill` column
holc_popup <- paste0(
  "<b>Grade ", chicago_holc$grade, "</b> — ", chicago_holc$category, "<br>",
  "Label: ", chicago_holc$label
)

pod_popup <- paste0(
  "<b>POD Camera</b><br>",
  "Camera #: ", pod_cameras$camera_number, "<br>",
  "Street: ",   pod_cameras$street,        "<br>",
  "Zip: ",      pod_cameras$zip
)

leaflet() |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    data        = chicago_holc,
    fillColor   = ~fill,
    fillOpacity = 0.65,
    color       = "white",
    weight      = 0.5,
    popup       = holc_popup,
    label       = ~paste0("Grade ", grade, " (", label, ")"),
    group       = "HOLC Grades"
  ) |>
  addCircleMarkers(
    data        = pod_cameras,
    radius      = 3,
    color       = "white",
    stroke      = TRUE, weight = 1.5,
    fillColor   = "#000000", fillOpacity = 1,
    popup       = pod_popup,
    label       = ~paste("POD Camera #", camera_number),
    group       = "POD Cameras"
  ) |>
  addLayersControl(
    overlayGroups = c("HOLC Grades", "POD Cameras"),
    options = layersControlOptions(collapsed = FALSE)
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    colors   = c("#76a865", "#7cb5bd", "#ffff00", "#d9838d", "#000000"),
    labels   = c("A — Best", "B — Still Desirable", "C — Definitely Declining", "D — Hazardous", "POD Camera"),
    title    = "HOLC Grade (1930s)"
  )
```

## Spatial Autocorrelation: Cameras vs. HOLC Grade

```{r holc-camera-aggregate}
# Project to Illinois StatePlane (EPSG:3435) for accurate area & neighbor calcs
chicago_holc_proj <- st_transform(chicago_holc, 3435)
pod_cameras_proj  <- st_transform(pod_cameras, 3435)

# Spatial join: assign each camera to its HOLC polygon
pod_in_holc <- st_join(pod_cameras_proj, chicago_holc_proj[, "area_id"])

cam_counts <- pod_in_holc |>
  st_drop_geometry() |>
  filter(!is.na(area_id)) |>
  count(area_id, name = "n_cameras")

# Numeric grade: A=1 (best) → D=4 (most disinvested)
grade_map <- c("A" = 1, "B" = 2, "C" = 3, "D" = 4)

holc_metrics <- chicago_holc_proj |>
  left_join(cam_counts, by = "area_id") |>
  mutate(
    n_cameras   = coalesce(n_cameras, 0L),
    area_mi2    = as.numeric(st_area(geometry)) / 2589988.11,
    cam_density = n_cameras / area_mi2,
    grade_num   = grade_map[grade]
  ) |>
  filter(!is.na(grade_num))

print(paste("HOLC polygons retained for Moran's I:", nrow(holc_metrics)))
```

```{r holc-weights}
# Queen contiguity neighbors; row-standardized weights.
# zero.policy keeps any orphan polygons (no shared edges) in the analysis.
nb <- poly2nb(holc_metrics, queen = TRUE)
lw <- nb2listw(nb, style = "W", zero.policy = TRUE)
```

```{r global-moran}
# Univariate Moran's I: do cameras cluster across HOLC polygons?
moran_cam <- moran.test(holc_metrics$cam_density, lw, zero.policy = TRUE)
print(moran_cam)

# Univariate Moran's I on grade itself — sanity check that grades cluster
moran_grade <- moran.test(holc_metrics$grade_num, lw, zero.policy = TRUE)
print(moran_grade)

# Bivariate Moran's I: camera density at i vs. lagged grade in i's neighbors.
# Positive value → camera-dense polygons surrounded by higher (worse) HOLC grades.
x     <- scale(holc_metrics$cam_density)[, 1]
y     <- scale(holc_metrics$grade_num)[, 1]
lag_y <- lag.listw(lw, y, zero.policy = TRUE)

bv_I <- sum(x * lag_y, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(x^2, na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("Bivariate Moran's I (cameras ~ lagged grade): %.3f\n", bv_I))
```

```{r local-moran}
# Local bivariate Moran computed manually: I_i = x_i * (Wy)_i  (Anselin, 1995).
# This avoids cross-version differences in spdep::localmoran_bv's return format.
local_I_vec <- x * lag_y

# Pseudo p-value via Monte Carlo: permute y, recompute lag, count |I_perm| >= |I_obs|.
set.seed(42)
nsim <- 499
perm_I <- replicate(nsim, {
  y_perm     <- sample(y)
  lag_y_perm <- lag.listw(lw, y_perm, zero.policy = TRUE)
  x * lag_y_perm
})
local_p_vec <- (rowSums(abs(perm_I) >= abs(local_I_vec)) + 1) / (nsim + 1)

holc_metrics$local_I <- local_I_vec
holc_metrics$local_p <- local_p_vec

# Quadrant classification — only label cells significant at p < 0.05
holc_metrics$quadrant <- case_when(
  local_p_vec >= 0.05 ~ "Not significant",
  x > 0 & lag_y > 0 ~ "High Cam / Worse-grade Neighbors",
  x < 0 & lag_y < 0 ~ "Low Cam / Better-grade Neighbors",
  x > 0 & lag_y < 0 ~ "High Cam / Better-grade Neighbors",
  x < 0 & lag_y > 0 ~ "Low Cam / Worse-grade Neighbors"
)

table(holc_metrics$quadrant)
```

```{r local-moran-map}
lisa_levels <- c(
  "High Cam / Worse-grade Neighbors",
  "Low Cam / Better-grade Neighbors",
  "High Cam / Better-grade Neighbors",
  "Low Cam / Worse-grade Neighbors",
  "Not significant"
)
lisa_pal <- colorFactor(
  palette = c("#d7191c", "#2c7bb6", "#fdae61", "#abd9e9", "#cccccc"),
  levels  = lisa_levels
)

holc_metrics_4326 <- st_transform(holc_metrics, 4326)

lisa_map <- leaflet(holc_metrics_4326) |>
  addProviderTiles(providers$CartoDB.Positron) |>
  addPolygons(
    fillColor   = ~lisa_pal(quadrant),
    fillOpacity = 0.75,
    color       = "white", weight = 0.5,
    popup       = ~paste0(
      "<b>Grade ", grade, "</b><br>",
      "Cameras: ", n_cameras, "<br>",
      "Density: ", round(cam_density, 2), " /mi²<br>",
      "Local I: ", round(local_I, 3), "<br>",
      "p-value: ", round(local_p, 3), "<br>",
      "Quadrant: ", quadrant
    )
  ) |>
  addLegend(
    position = "bottomright",
    pal      = lisa_pal,
    values   = lisa_levels,
    title    = "Bivariate LISA<br>(Cameras vs. HOLC Grade)"
  )

# Save static PNG copy (uses webshot2/chromote under the hood)
dir.create("output", showWarnings = FALSE)
mapview::mapshot(lisa_map, file = "output/lisa_cameras_holc.png")

lisa_map
```
